case_title: GARCIA, MANUEL VS ABCO AUTO ELECTRIC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY GARCIA, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT ABCO AUTO ELECTRIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
